summary: Excellent acoustic set captured on a pristine soundboard recording
review: The reviewer raves about the acoustic portion of this show, calling it irresistible and the very reason the band performed acoustics. The GEMS soundboard source provides a clean, well‑balanced capture, though no specific technical comments were made. Overall the performance and the tape are both held in high regard.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review but it is a full 5‑star rating praising the acoustic set; recording source (GEMS soundboard) is known for high fidelity, leading to an overall very high score despite limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific issues noted; GEMS soundboard recordings are typically clear and well balanced.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Acoustic set highlighted as the standout portion of the concert.
